summary: Uranium and nuclear-themed ETFs surged on news of Trump's policy backing for the nuclear industry. The top performer was Global X Uranium ETF (URA), up 10%, while other ETFs like North Shore Global Uranium Mining ETF (URNM) and VanEck Uranium+Nuclear Energy ETF (NLR) also saw strong gains. This rally is driven by the potential for increased demand for nuclear power as an alternative to solar and wind energy. ETFs provide diversified exposure and lessen single-stock risk.
